questions: What CLI module structure is needed for library commands?
How should library item resolution work for the <ref> argument?
What SKILL.md updates are needed for agent discoverability?

answers.answer: A new src/library/ module following the established switch-based pattern: index.ts router with subcommand dispatch (list, show, comments list, comments post), individual command files, and a resolve-library-item.ts utility in src/lib/. Main router src/index.ts needs a 'library' case added to the switch statement.
evidence: src/index.ts: switch-based command dispatch at lines 72-124, no 'library' case exists
src/comments/index.ts: 53-line module router with subcommand switch, configOrHelp pattern, resolveTicket call
No src/library/ directory exists (confirmed via index.ts imports)

answers.answer: Library item resolution mirrors resolve-ticket.ts pattern: extractLibraryRef from --item flag or positional arg, matchLibraryItem against items list by cuid, ticket shortId, or title substring. The API endpoint GET /library/items provides the items list for matching.
evidence: src/lib/resolve-ticket.ts: extractTicketRef + matchTicket pattern with priority matching (internal ID > short ID > numeric suffix)
Server API: GET /library/items endpoint returns items list (src/routes/api.ts line 318)

answers.answer: skill-content/SKILL.md needs a new 'Library' section in the Available Commands table documenting: hlx library list, hlx library show <ref>, hlx library comments list <ref> [--section <slug>], hlx library comments post <ref> --section <slug> --rating <value> [message]. Agent workflow example for library feedback loop should also be added.
evidence: skill-content/SKILL.md: command table at lines 31-50, workflow examples section follows
Scout reference-map: 4 commands specified, --section and --rating flags, rating values thumbs-up/love/thumbs-down

statement: The CLI needs a net-new src/library/ module with four commands (list, show, comments list, comments post) following the established comments module pattern. A resolve-library-item.ts utility mirrors the resolve-ticket.ts approach. SKILL.md must be updated for agent discoverability. No existing library infrastructure exists in the CLI—all code is greenfield. The patterns from comments/ and lib/ provide clear templates.
